This dashboard helps you visualize your supply chain at a glance. The
chart on the left ranks your inventory from lowest percentage to highest, immediately highlighting what needs to be reordered. The
chart on the right shows which menu items rely on the most ingredients, helping you identify supply bottlenecks.
If you need more help about understanding how to use other features you can

(how you buy and store the item, e.g. "kg") and your
(how you use it in dishes, e.g. "g"). Then, tell the system the conversion rate (e.g. 1 kg = 1000 g).
When you build your recipes, you can just think in grams, and the system will automatically deduct the precise fraction of a kilogram from your stock!

This is where you teach the system how to automatically deduct stock. Select a menu item from the left, then add the ingredients required to make it.
If you select "Mummy Farm Salad", you might add "Tomatoes" and set the quantity to "150". When a customer orders the salad, 150g of Tomatoes will vanish from your Raw Stock completely automatically.
